displayName: Privilege Escalation - User Added to Privileged Group
description: Fires when someone gets added to a privileged group like Domain Admins, Enterprise Admins, or Global Administrator. Covers both on-prem AD (event IDs 4728, 4732, 4756) and Azure AD role assignments through audit logs.
query:
let privilegedGroups = dynamic([
    "Domain Admins",
    "Enterprise Admins",
    "Schema Admins",
    "Administrators",
    "Account Operators",
    "Backup Operators",
    "Print Operators",
    "Server Operators",
    "Group Policy Creator Owners"
]);
let privilegedAadRoles = dynamic([
    "Global Administrator",
    "Privileged Role Administrator",
    "Security Administrator",
    "Exchange Administrator",
    "SharePoint Administrator",
    "Helpdesk Administrator",
    "User Administrator"
]);
// On-prem AD: member added to security group
let adEvents = SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1d)
| where EventID in (4728, 4732, 4756) // global/local/universal security group member add
| extend
    ActorAccount  = SubjectUserName,
    TargetAccount = MemberName,
    GroupName     = TargetUserName,
    Source        = "Active Directory"
| where GroupName in~ (privilegedGroups)
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    Source,
    ActorAccount,
    TargetAccount,
    GroupOrRole = GroupName,
    Computer,
    EventID;
// Azure AD: role assignment events
let aadEvents = AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1d)
| where OperationName in ("Add member to role", "Add member to role completed (PIM activation)")
| where Result == "success"
| extend
    ActorAccount  = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName),
    TargetAccount = tostring(TargetResources[0].userPrincipalName),
    GroupOrRole   = tostring(TargetResources[1].displayName),
    Source        = "Azure AD"
| where GroupOrRole in~ (privilegedAadRoles)
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    Source,
    ActorAccount,
    TargetAccount,
    GroupOrRole,
    Computer = "",
    EventID  = 0;
union adEvents, aadEvents
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    Source,
    ActorAccount,
    TargetAccount,
    GroupOrRole,
    Computer
| sort by TimeGenerated desc

alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: {{TargetAccount}} was added to the privileged group/role '{{GroupOrRole}}' by {{ActorAccount}} via {{Source}}.
